config.name: apache_http_logs-latest_transform
config.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: apache_http_logs-latest
-- OCSF Class: HTTP Activity (6001)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T10:59:46.015949

-- Pre-compile patterns for better performance
local TIMESTAMP_PATTERN = "(%d%d)/(%a+)/(%d%d%d%d):(%d%d):(%d%d):(%d%d)%s+([%+%-]%d+)"

-- HTTP method to activity_id mapping
local HTTP_METHOD_IDS = {
    DELETE = 2,
    GET = 3,
    POST = 6
}

-- Month name to number mapping
local MONTHS = {
    Jan = 1, Feb = 2, Mar = 3, Apr = 4, May = 5, Jun = 6,
    Jul = 7, Aug = 8, Sep = 9, Oct = 10, Nov = 11, Dec = 12
}

function transform(record)
    -- Input validation with early return
    if not record or type(record) ~= "table" then
        return nil, "Invalid input record"
    end

    -- Initialize OCSF-compliant output with efficient table construction
    local output = {
        class_uid = 6001,
        class_name = "HTTP Activity",
        category_uid = 6,
        category_name = "Network Activity",
        type_uid = 600101,
        metadata = {
            version = "1.0.0",
            product = {
                name = "Apache HTTP Server",
                vendor = "Apache"
            }
        },
        src_endpoint = {},
        http_request = {},
        http_response = {},
        actor = {
            user = {}
        }
    }

    -- Efficient field mapping with null checks
    if record.src and record.src.ip and record.src.ip.address then
        output.src_endpoint.ip = record.src.ip.address
    end

    if record.actor and record.actor.user and record.actor.user.name then
        output.actor.user.name = record.actor.user.name
    end

    -- HTTP method mapping with activity_id assignment
    if record.http_request and record.http_request.activity_name then
        local method = record.http_request.activity_name
        output.http_request.method = method
        output.activity_id = HTTP_METHOD_IDS[method] or 1
    end

    -- Handle HTTP response fields
    if record.http_response then
        if record.http_response.code then
            output.http_response.status_code = tonumber(record.http_response.code)
        end
        if record.http_response.body_length then
            output.http_response.body_size = tonumber(record.http_response.body_length)
        end
    end

    -- URL path handling
    if record.http_request and record.http_request.url and record.http_request.url.path then
        output.http_request.url = record.http_request.url.path
    end

    -- Timestamp parsing and conversion
    if record.timestamp then
        local day, month, year, hour, min, sec, tz = string.match(record.timestamp, TIMESTAMP_PATTERN)
        if day and month and year and hour and min and sec then
            local month_num = MONTHS[month]
            if month_num then
                -- Convert to UNIX timestamp (milliseconds)
                output.time = os.time({
                    year = tonumber(year),
                    month = month_num,
                    day = tonumber(day),
                    hour = tonumber(hour),
                    min = tonumber(min),
                    sec = tonumber(sec)
                }) * 1000
            end
        end
    end

    -- Validation of required fields
    if not output.time then
        output.time = os.time() * 1000
    end

    if not output.activity_id or output.activity_id == 0 then
        output.activity_id = 1 -- Default activity_id
    end

    return output
end

-- Error handling wrapper
function safe_transform(record)
    local success, result = pcall(transform, record)
    if not success then
        return nil, string.format("Transform error: %s", result)
    end
    return result
end
